SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic

Class GameModel

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.GameModel
public class GameModel extends Object
This class is the Model of the game. It contains the state of the game and provides some methods to update this state, according to the game rules. When the state of the game changes, an Event is created and notified to the controller.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameModel

      public GameModel(int numPlayers) throws WrongNumberOfPlayersException
      Class constructor specifying numPlayers
      Parameters:
      numPlayers - An int that represents the number of players that is required in order to start the match (min 2, max 4)
      Throws:
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - If numPlayers less than 2 or more than 4

  • Method Details

    • addListener

      public void addListener(UpdateListener listener)
      Subscribe a listener to this GameModel
      Parameters:
      listener - the UpdateListener to add as a listener of this GameModel

    • removeListener

      public int removeListener(UpdateListener listener)
      Remove a listener from this GameModel
      Parameters:
      listener - the UpdateListener to remove
      Returns:
      0 if, after removing this listener, there are no more listeners subscribed to this GameModel 1 if there are still some listeners subscribed to this GameModel

    • getListeners

      public List<UpdateListener> getListeners()
      Getter method for listeners

    • getLobby

      public List<String> getLobby()
      Getter method for the players in the lobby

    • addPlayerToLobby

      public void addPlayerToLobby(String nickname, VirtualView view) throws WrongNumberOfPlayersException, DuplicateNicknameException, IllegalStateException, InvalidParameterException
      Add a user to the match lobby.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String to identify the new user.
      view - A VirtualView to subscribe to this GameModel as a listener
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null
      DuplicateNicknameException - if the nickname is already in use
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - if there is already the maximum number of players in the lobby.

    • addPlayersToMatch

      public void addPlayersToMatch() throws WrongNumberOfPlayersException, IllegalStateException, EmptyDeckException
      Add the users in the lobby as players of the match
      Throws:
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - if the number of nicknames in the lobby differs from the number of players of the match. In this case no player is added.
      IllegalStateException
      EmptyDeckException

    • placeStartCard

      public void placeStartCard(String nickname, boolean selectedSide) throws WrongInformationException, NotYourTurnException, IllegalStateException, InvalidParameterException, InvalidPlacementException
      Place the starter card on the grid of each the player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      selectedSide - A boolean that indicates the selected side of the starter card: TRUE = front; FALSE = back
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null
      WrongInformationException - if the player is not part of this match
      NotYourTurnException - if it's not the turn of the player
      InvalidPlacementException - if a start card has already been placed for the player

    • setPlayerColour

      public void setPlayerColour(String nickname, PlayerColour selectedColour) throws NotYourTurnException, IllegalStateException, InvalidParameterException, WrongInformationException
      Assign a colour to a player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      selectedColour - the colour chosen by the player
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if any of the parameters is null
      WrongInformationException - if the player is not part of this match, or the selected colour is not available
      NotYourTurnException - if it's not the turn of the player

    • distributeCards

      public void distributeCards() throws EmptyDeckException, IllegalStateException
      Distribute cards to the players, in order to start the match.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      EmptyDeckException - if the objective deck is empty

    • setPlayerObjective

      public void setPlayerObjective(String nickname, boolean selectedObjective) throws WrongInformationException, NotYourTurnException, InvalidParameterException, IllegalStateException
      Assign the selected secret objective to a player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      selectedObjective - A boolean that indicates the selected objective TRUE = first objective; FALSE = second objective
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if any of the parameters is null
      WrongInformationException - if the player is not part of this match
      NotYourTurnException - if it's not the turn of the player

    • getPlaceablePositions

      public void getPlaceablePositions(String nickname, int xpos, int ypos) throws InvalidSearchPositionException, NotYourTurnException, InvalidParameterException, IllegalStateException, WrongInformationException
      Check which positions are available for placing, around a selected card.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player
      xpos - An int that represents the row of the selected card.
      ypos - An int that represents the column of the selected card.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null
      WrongInformationException - if the player is not part of this match
      NotYourTurnException - if it's not the turn of the player
      InvalidSearchPositionException - if the given position is invalid.

    • placeCard

      public void placeCard(String nickname, int index, boolean side, int xpos, int ypos) throws InvalidParameterException, InvalidPlacementException, NotYourTurnException, IllegalStateException, WrongInformationException
      Place the selected card on the grid of the player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player
      index - An int that indicates which card has to be placed. (0 = first card in hand, 1 = second card in hand ...)
      side - A boolean that indicates the selected side of the card: TRUE = front; FALSE = back;
      xpos - An int that represents the row of the position where to place the card.
      ypos - An int that represents the column of the position where to place the card.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      NotYourTurnException - if it's not the turn of the player
      WrongInformationException - if the player is not part of this match
      InvalidParameterException - if any of the parameters null or out of bounds
      InvalidPlacementException - if the placement fails

    • drawCard

      public void drawCard(String nickname, int index) throws InvalidParameterException, EmptyDeckException, NotYourTurnException, IllegalStateException, WrongInformationException
      Draw a card for the player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player
      index - An int that indicates which card has to be drawn. - index = 0 : public gold 1; - index = 1 : public gold 2; - index = 2 : public resource 1; - index = 3 : public resource 2; - index = 4 : hidden gold; - index = 5 : hidden resource;
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null, or index lower than 0 or higher than 5
      WrongInformationException - if the player is not part of this match
      NotYourTurnException - if it's not the turn of the player
      EmptyDeckException - if the selected deck is empty.

    • endGame

      public void endGame() throws IllegalStateException
      It calculates the endgame points of the match and defines the result of it. It creates a classification ordered from the winner to the worst player
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.

    • manageChat

      public void manageChat(String nickname, String addressee, boolean publicMess, String chatMessage) throws WrongInformationException, InvalidParameterException
      It manages the chat between the players
      Parameters:
      nickname - name of the sender
      addressee - name of the addressee
      chatMessage - message to send
      Throws:
      WrongInformationException - if the sender or the addressee is not part of this match
      InvalidParameterException - if a parameter is null or empty

    • forceEndGame

      public void forceEndGame()
      When called, forces the game to end

    • getState

      public State getState()
      Get the current state of the game
      Returns:
      a State with the current game state
